title: Simple Paxels + Mode Switch
description: Use Paxels for easier handling of Strip, Plow and Path.
body:
**Simple Paxels add 5 Paxels.** **Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond and Netherite** **It comes also with 5 different Modes:**
None - Only Digging like a Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel and Hoe.
Axe - Allow to strip Logs.
Hoe - Allow to Plow Farmland
Shovel - Allow to Plow Dirt Paths
Campfire - Allow to ignite or extinguish a Campfire. (this mode is disabled by default via configs, but can be enabled.)

**How to switch Modes ?**
Shift+Rightmouseclick in Air or on Blocks.
Also works while flying.

**For Modpack Devs:**
Also 3 other Paxels added to the game but without working Recipes atm because of missing Mods in this Version.
Allthemodium Paxel - Indestructible + modes from Vanilla Paxels.
Vibranium Paxel - Indestructible + modes from Vanilla Paxels.
Unobtainium Paxel - Indestructible + modes from Vanilla Paxels.
**This 3 Paxels work also without Allthemodium Mod but u need to add your own Recipes for it or wait for Allthemodium Mod Release for NeoForge 1.20.2 or higher.**
